ref: # Component bill-of-materials for the OI 8HP TCU schematic.
# Every reference designator that appears in nets.csv must also appear here.
# `datasheet_path` either points at the local archive copy or a URL.

description: ZF G8P75HZ Mechatronik internal connector — see proposals/hardware/oem_interface
Octal solenoid driver — chip 0 (clutches A/B/C/D/E + TCC + Line Pressure + spare)
Octal solenoid driver — chip 1 (Park Hold + Park Release + 6 spares)
High-speed CAN transceiver with sleep/wake on CAN
LIN 2.x transceiver for the aux pump (HZ hybrid 'box only)
5V to 3.3V LDO for STM32 logic supply
SWD programming/debug header (VDD GND SWDIO SWCLK)
Resettable fuse on 5V supply to TCM pin 15
Gas discharge arrestor on VBAT (per ZombieVerter V1.2 design)
Flyback diode on Park Hold solenoid output
Pull-up reference for oil temp NTC divider
